rulings.Case Title: WILMA HOOSER et al VS. ADVOCATE MINES, LIMITED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave Of Court To File Cross-Complaint Against The Manville Personal Injury Settlement Trust By Calaveras Asbestos, Ltd. [428.10; 428.50]
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, July 6, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. Defendant Calaveras Asbestos Ltd.¿s motion for leave to file a cross-complaint against the Manville personal injury settlement trust is granted. No opposition filed. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: THORNTON VS BABCOCK BORSIG POWER INC*
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO DISMISS FOR FAILURE TO PROSCECUTE
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, July 6, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 4. Defendant Crane Co.¿s motion to dismiss for failure to prosecute is granted. No opposition filed. A hearing is required unless counsel for Crane Co. informs the plaintiffs of the tentative ruling and the plaintiffs state that they do not wish to contest it. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: THORNTON VS BABCOCK BORSIG POWER INC*
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder To Defendant Crane Co.'S Motion To Dismiss [C.C.P. § 583.360]
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, July 6, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 4. Defendant Flour Corporation's joinder to Crane Co.¿s motion to dismiss for failure to prosecute is granted. No opposition filed. A hearing is required unless counsel for Fluor informs the plaintiffs of the tentative ruling and they state that they do not wish to contest it. =(220/HEK)
